parameters.subject: Hey {{ $json.name }} — need a hand getting started?
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.name }},

We noticed you haven't completed all your onboarding steps yet. No worries — we're here to help!

Your next step: {{ $json.nextStep.replace(/_/g, ' ') }}

Here are some quick resources:
• Step-by-step guide: docs.yourcompany.com/onboarding
• Video walkthrough: youtube.com/@yourcompany/onboarding
• Schedule a free call: calendly.com/yourcompany/onboarding

If you're stuck on anything, just reply to this email.

Best,
The Onboarding Team

parameters.functionCode:
// Log progress for on-track customers
return [{ json: { status: 'on_track', customer: $json.name, steps: $json.completedSteps.length } }];
